heading: Indexes
body:
This collection contains the following indexes:

| Name        | Index              | Description                            | Properties |
| ----------- | ------------------ | -------------------------------------- | ---------- |
| \_id\_      | \{ "\_id": 1 }     | Primary key index on the \_id field.   |            |
| user\_id\_1 | \{ "user\_id" : 1} | Ascending index on the user\_id field. | Unique     |
